Sample PRD

This is a sample PRD for testing the Confluence Git Sync plugin.

Overview

This document describes a hypothetical feature for testing purposes.

Problem Statement

Users need a way to test the plugin's conversion pipeline.

Requirements

  • Requirement 1: The plugin must convert Markdown to Confluence Storage Format
  • Requirement 2: The plugin must handle frontmatter
  • Requirement 3: The plugin must resolve wiki-links

Implementation

python

blockquote: This is a blockquote for testing.
